Bash(python -c "
from docx import Document
doc = Document\(''datedrop_system_design_v1.1.docx''\)
for para in doc.paragraphs:
    print\(para.text\)
print\(''\\n\\n========== TABLES ==========''\)
for i, table in enumerate\(doc.tables\):
    print\(f''\\n--- TABLE {i+1} ---''\)
    for row in table.rows:
        print\('' | ''.join\(cell.text for cell in row.cells\)\)
")
